title: pocketdimensions:pocketdimensions-handbook-title-admin
text: Admin workflows Pocket Dimensions can run as an admin-only utility, a player-facing survival/RP feature, or a hybrid service. Configure this in ModConfig/pocket_dimensions.json. Command privileges remain the recovery and admin path; the Pocket Directory, Waystones, elevators, and pocket block policy use capability modes for normal player workflows. Capability modes - Privilege: only players with the configured privilege can use that action. This is the default for every action. - OwnerOrPrivilege: the pocket owner or a privileged admin can use that action. - OwnerMemberOrPrivilege: the owner, listed members, or a privileged admin can use that action. Members are stored on the pocket stack in ModData/pocketdimensions/waystone-links.json. - Public: any online player can use that action, with the configured privilege still acting as an admin override. - Disabled: non-privileged access is disabled for that action; the configured privilege remains the staff override. Config keys - CreatePocketCapabilityMode: controls Pocket Directory pocket creation. - CreateLayerCapabilityMode: controls Pocket Directory and elevator-confirmed layer creation. - EditLayerCapabilityMode: controls layer display-name edits. - DirectoryVisibilityCapabilityMode: controls which pockets and layers appear in the directory. - DirectoryTeleportCapabilityMode: controls directory Enter buttons. - UseWaystoneCapabilityMode: controls right-click entry through bound external Pocket Waystones. - UseElevatorCapabilityMode: controls PageUp/PageDown layer travel on Pocket Elevators. - UsePocketBlocksCapabilityMode: controls use interactions inside pocket dimensions. - MutatePocketBlocksCapabilityMode: controls building/breaking inside mutable pockets, except protected generated anchors. Recommended setups - Admin-only service: keep all capability modes at Privilege and keep privileges at root. - Player-owned pockets: set creation to Public or a non-root privilege, then set directory visibility, teleport, Waystone use, elevator use, layer creation, and block mutation to OwnerOrPrivilege or OwnerMemberOrPrivilege. - Public travel hub: set directory visibility and teleport to Public, but keep creation, layer creation, and mutation privilege-gated. Staff commands - /pocket inspect [name] shows a pocket's stack, layer, spawn, prepared/orphaned state, elevator, and return pedestal status. - /pocket bind <name> binds the selected external Pocket Waystone. - /pocket unbind clears the selected external Pocket Waystone binding. - /pocket release <name> confirm marks a pocket orphaned through DimensionLib. Protected generated blocks, including the pocket floor and return pedestal, remain unbreakable through normal block-breaking hooks.
